# aman-bhandari claude-code-agent-skills-framework

**Source:** https://github.com/aman-bhandari/claude-code-agent-skills-framework  
**Imported:** 2026-05-30  
**Why:** Rule-obsolescence audit pattern + concentric-loop teaching approach.

## Key patterns adopted

- **Rule obsolescence audit:** Periodically review rules to see if they're still needed
- **Concentric-loop teaching:** Skills get more detailed with each section (Brief → Detail → Reference)

## Skills imported

| Skill | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `rule-obsolescence-audit` | Check if Golden Rules are still needed or can be relaxed |
